transcript: Wh... what are you talkin' about, now?
We don't have any dogs runnin' back and forth. How old are ya, anyhow?
If we get a trace on this phone... yeah, how're you gonna like that?
I'm gonna call, uh... and report this... because this is harassment on the phone.
We're not.. we're not gonna put up with... what did you say? "Dog fighting"? Treatin', uh... animals cruelly?
You might as well get yourself a doggone good attorney, my friend.
Bring 'em on. C'mon, go for it.
Gonna call the phone company and get the, uh... tracer goin' on you, because this is gonna stop.
I'm gonna call the phone company, we're gonna stop you in your tracks... ya dumbass.
[to someone in background] Do I... do I erase his number?
What?! Well, you get lost! You got the wrong goddamned number, ya jerk!
I'm 'onna whoop ya in the ass!
'[sampled]' Aw, you can't whoop me, I'll whoop your ass!
